allow: PowerShell($job = Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "next dev -p 3000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\yusuf\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\varosh" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/settings" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r.StatusCode } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/pos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r.StatusCode } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/receipt/1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r.StatusCode } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { $_.Exception.Message } })
PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback' -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch '^169\\.' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias)
